overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through the Mediterranean-inspired city of Beauclair. The character traverses narrow cobblestone alleys, stone staircases, and sunlit plazas with distinctive red-roofed buildings and archways, transitioning from enclosed passages to open terraces with mountain views.

bright blue painted building wall with window
large potted tree in terracotta container
stone stairs ascending along the right wall
vibrant red building facade with balconies

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, shadowed cobblestone alley beneath a stone archway. A blue plastered wall and potted tree line the left side, while a stone staircase climbs the right wall toward a red stucco building visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase passage transitioning to terrace overlook

events.description: exiting dark stone passage into bright sunlight revealing panoramic mountain and sea view
transitioning from enclosed stairwell to open terrace with scenic overlook

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs through a dark passage and descending toward a sunlit terrace with mountain views

entered.detail: distant mountain range visible beyond the city
stone balustrade overlooking the lower city

segments.scene_description: The character ascends and descends stone stairs through a shadowed passage, emerging into bright sunlight on a terrace. The enclosed space opens to reveal a stunning panoramic view of distant mountains and sea beyond the city walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open terrace plaza leading to covered archway

events.description: following NPC in teal dress through stone archway passage

lush green shrubs with red flowers

segments.scene_description: Walking across a sunlit cobblestone plaza with flowering bushes and decorative balconies, the character follows a woman in a teal dress toward a dark stone archway covered in ivy, transitioning from open terrace to covered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street with red petals leading to city gate

events.description: exiting dark archway into street covered with red flower petals

agents.ego_description: walking uphill on cobblestone street scattered with red petals toward a large decorative city gate

entered.detail: ornate stone archway with red and gold decorative elements
wooden stand displaying paintings on the sidewalk
cobblestones covered in scattered red flower petals

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark archway onto a sunlit cobblestone street covered in red flower petals, the character walks uphill past art displays and historic buildings toward an ornate decorative city gate with red and gold detailing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a Mediterranean city, transitioning from narrow, shadowed alleys into expansive sunlit plazas and historic streets. It begins in a dim cobblestone passage beneath a stone archway, moving past a blue plastered wall and a climbing staircase toward a distant red stucco building. As the character ascends and descends these stairs, the enclosed space suddenly opens into a bright terrace that reveals a panoramic view of distant mountains and the sea. The scene then shifts across a sunlit plaza filled with flowering bushes and decorative balconies, following a woman in a teal dress toward an ivy-covered archway. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness onto a street blanketed in red flower petals, moving uphill past art displays toward an ornate red and gold city gate.
